title: Mirror a status column but not its Values

posts.author: James3 (James Warner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Community,
I have been searching the forums for answers if this has already been asked but no luck.

I was wondering if you can link Status columns so that when you create a new label it will add that new label to all linked status columns. I don’t want to mirror the values in these columns though. Is this possible? Any clues?

Thanks in advance,

James
